title: Midnight Dream
lyrics:
Verse 1:
Wah gwaan, everyting's alright
I wake up to the sunshine bright
The breeze is blowin' gentle on my skin
I feel the love, let the good times spin
I'm movin' to the rhythm of the earth below
My spirit's free, my heart is aglow

Chorus:
Rise up, let the music take control
Feel the vibe, let your spirit unfold
We're dancin' to the beat of love and light
Everything's gonna be alright, tonight

Verse 2:
I see the beauty, in every single place
The smiles on faces, the love that time won't erase
I feel the unity, the bond that we share
We're all connected, without a single care
The music's playin', it's a symphony of joy
We're singin' together, our hearts employ

Chorus:
Rise up, let the music take control
Feel the vibe, let your spirit unfold
We're dancin' to the beat of love and light
Everything's gonna be alright, tonight
